overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking from an urban street intersection at night, crossing the road, and proceeding along a waterfront promenade as the sun rises, transitioning from night to day. The environment features palm trees, highway overpasses, a large truss bridge, and industrial structures across the water.

events.description: character crosses the multi-lane street, avoiding passing vehicles
completes crossing and turns to walk along the road

agents.ego_description: waiting at the street corner then crossing the road while cars pass by

notable_agents.action: green vintage sedan driving through the intersection

entered.detail: tall palm tree silhouetted against the night sky
elevated highway structure with street lighting visible in the distance
large grey utility box on the sidewalk corner
modern street light illuminating the intersection
white striped pedestrian crossing on the asphalt

segments.scene_description: The character stands at a night-time urban street corner near a highway overpass, waiting for traffic to clear. Palm trees line the street as cars pass by, including a distinctive green vintage sedan. The character then crosses the zebra-striped crosswalk, navigating between vehicles.

events.description: ground surface changes from concrete sidewalk to paved plaza tiles as the waterfront approaches
ambient light begins to increase as dawn approaches, sky lightening in the east

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the street toward the waterfront promenade area

notable_agents.action: person walking in the opposite direction on the sidewalk

entered.detail: wooden utility pole with transformers and yellow safety bands
red brick paved pedestrian plaza area
large rectangular planter with red and purple flowers
wooden park bench facing the water
metal safety railing along the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the concrete sidewalk past utility poles and palm trees, leaving the intersection behind. The environment transitions from street to waterfront plaza with paved tiles, flower planters, and benches. The sky begins to lighten as dawn approaches, and a pedestrian walks by in the opposite direction.

events.description: sun rises above the horizon, casting warm golden hour light across the water and industrial buildings
transition from golden hour to full daylight, sun becoming brighter and higher in the sky

agents.ego_description: strolling along the waterfront promenade enjoying the view of the bridge and industrial area across the river

entered.detail: large steel truss bridge spanning the river in the distance
factory complex with smokestacks and industrial structures across the water
calm river water reflecting the changing sky colors

segments.scene_description: Walking along the wide waterfront promenade with metal railings, the character enjoys views of the large truss bridge and industrial buildings across the river. The scene transitions from night through golden hour to daylight, with the sun rising and illuminating the water. Flower planters and benches line the paved walkway as the highway overpass looms overhead.

events.description: full daylight achieved with bright sun creating glare on the water surface
path curves slightly to the right following the riverbank

agents.ego_description: continuing along the waterfront path under the overpass in bright daylight

entered.detail: ornate black metal lamp post with classic design

segments.scene_description: In bright daylight, the character continues walking along the waterfront promenade now under the shadow of the highway overpass. The sun creates glare on the river water, and industrial buildings are clearly visible across the water. Victorian-style lamp posts and benches line the paved walkway as the path curves gently along the riverbank.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dark urban intersection at night into a bright, sunlit waterfront promenade. It begins at a street corner beneath a highway overpass, where the character waits for traffic to clear and crosses a zebra-striped crosswalk past palm trees and a green vintage sedan. As the character leaves the intersection and walks past utility poles, the concrete sidewalk transitions into a paved waterfront plaza with flower planters and benches while the sky begins to lighten. The scene then opens onto a wide promenade with metal railings, where the lighting shifts from the deep tones of night through a golden hour glow as the sun rises over a large truss bridge and distant industrial buildings. Finally, the environment settles into bright daylight, with the camera moving under the shadow of the overpass along a curving riverbank lined with Victorian-style lamp posts and shimmering water.
